array.string:
# Wait for network sleep 10
# Create mount point if not exists mkdir -p /tmp/nas
# Check if already mounted if ! mount | grep -q "/tmp/nas"; then # Mount NAS mount -t smbfs '//alin:yh7S8jNW@192.168.21.135/aling' /tmp/nas echo "$(date): NAS mounted" >> /var/log/nas-mount.log else echo "$(date): NAS already mounted" >> /var/log/nas-mount.log fi
